/*! * normalize-path <https://github.com/jonschlinkert/normalize-path> * * Copyright (c) 2014-2018, Jon Schlinkert. * Released under the MIT License. */ module.exports = function(path, stripTrailing) { if (typeof path !== 'string') { throw new TypeError('expected path to be a string'); } if (path === '\\' || path === '/') return '/'; var len = path.length; if (len <= 1) return path; // ensure that win32 namespaces has two leading slashes, so that the path is // handled properly by the win32 version of path.parse() after being normalized // https://msdn.microsoft.com/library/windows/desktop/aa365247(v=vs.85).aspx#namespaces var prefix = ''; if (len > 4 && path[3] === '\\') { var ch = path[2]; if ((ch === '?' || ch === '.') && path.slice(0, 2) === '\\\\') { path = path.slice(2); prefix = '//'; } } var segs = path.split(/[/\\]+/); if (stripTrailing !== false && segs[segs.length - 1] === '') { segs.pop(); } return prefix + segs.join('/'); };
